completed_work: Regenerated docs/self_model/SELF_MODEL.json with completed plans = 2 and supported warrants = 4.
Updated self-model tests for completion state.
key_decisions: PLAN-20260706-0001 is completed and has no remaining implementation work.
Future automatic L0 retrieval or selection behavior requires a separate PLAN and WARRANT.
next_actions: Start a new governed slice only if automatic L0 retrieval, context selection changes, or provider prompt changes are desired.
risks: Future work may confuse context_match telemetry with automatic retrieval unless a new governed slice explicitly admits that behavior.
summary_text: Commit c6f09f0 completed PLAN-20260706-0001. The completion added VERIFY-20260706-0001 and WARR-20260706-0002, changed PLAN-20260706-0001 status to completed, rebuilt SELF_MODEL.json, and updated self-model tests. SELF_MODEL.json now reports plan_counts.completed = 2, open_plans = [], admitted_plans = [PLAN-20260705-0001, PLAN-20260706-0001], and warrant_counts.supported = 4. The completed slice remains diagnostic-only: it certifies read-only context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics and does not claim provider prompt changes, context selection changes, or automatic L0 retrieval behavior. Post-commit audit after c6f09f0 returned ok true and content current.
